_comment: Demo Lab — snapshot ledger. v1 is a manual log (entries added when a snapshot is taken in the env itself). v2 will integrate with Power Platform CLI / Dataverse Backup APIs for real snapshot/restore.

snapshots.label: Pre-Pella demo data load
snapshots.notes: Baseline before loading Pella-specific accounts and Field Service work orders for the May 29 EBC demo.

snapshots.label: Clean Gold Template baseline
snapshots.notes: Clean baseline of Mfg Gold Template — no customer data, ready to clone for new engagements.

snapshots.label: Pre-AMETEK warranty demo
snapshots.notes: Before importing AMETEK warranty case data + custom topic for warranty agent demo.

snapshots.label: Post Presence Hub PCF install
snapshots.notes: Captured after Presence Hub PCF installed and validated. Ready to promote to Master CE Mfg if approved.

promotions.notes: Validated for 2 weeks in HA, no issues — promoted to Prod for live demos.
